examples: I can console myself with the fact that I'm not alone.
This Christmas sees the launch of a new games console.

Still, with its next console called Revolution, Nintendo doesn't want to dominate your living room.
While you suffer, console yourself that the hip surgeon is paying his fair share in taxes.
